'''Gonster''' was a member of a [[Sentience/Legends|sapient]], [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with large, pointed [[Ear/Legends|ears]], and two heads with wide [[Mouth/Legends|mouths]]. He lived in the [[Twin Hills]] of the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]] with his pet [[hoosha]]. The two-headed Gonster used dried [[wank]]'s hide in the creation of the [[magic cap]], a magical [[Hat/Legends|hat]] that was used to trap the [[Raich]] in the form of a harmless [[Tree/Legends|tree]].
